summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM Quote Analytics Dashboard - all backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Quote response missing visibleTotal/internalTotal fields in response structure
minor_issues.impact: Minor - monetization data available in other endpoints

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts render but show dimension warnings

passed_tests: Quote Analytics Dashboard page loads at /admin/analytics/quotes
GET /api/admin/quote-analytics/managers returns manager performance with override tracking
KPI cards display correct metrics (53 quotes, 47.17% conversion, $119.1K margin)
Scenario Performance section shows conversion rates for all scenarios
Manager Performance table displays with override tracking and lost revenue
Source Performance section shows conversion rates by source
Lost Revenue Analysis section displays with $4.7K total lost revenue
Navigation to Quote Analytics via sidebar Auto section works
All MongoDB aggregation pipelines return real data
